chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-458 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 19.04.2022 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. --- None present for the petitioner, the petitioner in this petition has challenged the notice of the Mukhtiarkar whereby petitioner was asked to furnish the relevant documents which could entitle plaintiff for the subject land. Petitioner in this case has challenged the action of demolition of the property in respect of Plot No.13 RS No.146, 723, Plots No.10, 20, 21 RS 146, 723 and Mohaga of RS No.723, Maan at Deh Shahdadpur, situated at Gulshan-e-Dastageer Housing Scheme, Tando Adam Road, Shahdadpur, and further to suspend the operation of the notice. In substance, the notice has only called for the documents that may entitle him to retain the property. However, the petitioner rushed to file this petition. We are afraid that petitioner cannot seek a declaration to the above extent which primarily vests with the civil court. However, without prejudice to the above the requisite notice only calls for documents which he may furnish to the satisfaction of the Mukhtiarkar. The petition being misconceived is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
